hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(rm -rf /|rm -rf \*|DROP DATABASE|TRUNCATE TABLE|:(){ :|:& };:)'; then echo '{"permissionDecision": "deny", "message": "BLOCKED: Dangerous command detected!"}'; exit 2; fi

BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$BRANCH" = "main" ] || [ "$BRANCH" = "master" ]; then echo '{"permissionDecision": "deny", "message": "BLOCKED: Cannot edit directly on main/master. Create a feature branch first."}'; exit 2; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then if command -v npx &>/dev/null; then RESULT=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -10); if [ -n "$RESULT" ]; then echo "{\"feedback\": \"TypeCheck results:\n$RESULT\"}"; fi; fi; fi

echo '{"feedback": "Session started. CLAUDE.md loaded. Checking environment..."}'; if [ -f package.json ] && [ ! -d node_modules ]; then echo '{"feedback": "WARNING: node_modules missing. Run npm install."}'; fi; if [ -f .env.example ] && [ ! -f .env ]; then echo '{"feedback": "WARNING: .env file missing. Copy from .env.example."}'; fi; BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$BRANCH" ]; then echo "{\"feedback\": \"Git branch: $BRANCH\"}"; fi; if command -v typescript-language-server &>/dev/null; then echo '{"feedback": "LSP: TypeScript server available"}'; else echo '{"feedback": "WARNING: typescript-language-server not found. Run: npm i -g typescript-language-server"}'; fi

INPUT=$(cat); AGENT_ID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.agent_id // empty'); TRANSCRIPT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.agent_transcript_path // empty'); if [ -n "$AGENT_ID" ]; then echo "{\"feedback\": \"Subagent $AGENT_ID completed. Transcript: $TRANSCRIPT\"}"; fi

INPUT=$(cat); STOP_ACTIVE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.stop_hook_active // false'); if [ "$STOP_ACTIVE" = "true" ]; then exit 0; fi; if [ -f package.json ]; then RESULT=$(npm run build 2>&1); ERRORS=$(echo "$RESULT" | grep -ci 'error' || true); if [ "$ERRORS" -gt 0 ] && [ "$ERRORS" -lt 5 ]; then echo "{\"decision\": \"block\", \"reason\": \"Build has $ERRORS error(s). Fix them before completing.\"}"; fi; fi
